title: My Life For Thee!
description:
Gameplay:An erotic RPG featuring turn-based combat where you battle enemy knights, monsters, and various foes. 

Defeat means immediate violation, and the heroines are fully voiced!

Story: Samurai Girl from the East x Princess from a Foreign Land!

Mikage, a swordswoman from the Eastern Lands, travels to the continent to hone her skills, earning her keep by completing guild requests. 

One fateful day, she receives a request to escort the princess of the recently defeated Malkut Kingdom...!

A perilous journey to seek asylum, protecting a fallen kingdom's princess through enemy territory to allied lands!

Can she protect the beautiful princess, her new lord, from the clutches of the enemy?

If captured, endless interrogation and violation await...!

The enemy soldiers will stop at nothing to make her reveal the princess's location. 

However, as a warrior, she won't yield easily, no matter what they do to her!

If the princess falls into enemy hands, all is lost. 

And it's not just enemy soldiers who are drawn to her beauty...

Protect your lord, the princess, even if it costs your life!

Features:Stunning illustrations... plus fully voiced erotic scenes!

〇 An "Easy Mode" for those short on time

→ Start with the ultimate weapon and breeze past weaker enemies!

〇 Includes an "Instant Defeat Item" for quick access to erotic scenes

〇 Unlock all scenes in the Recollection Room after clearing the game!

Game System:

〇 Estimated Playtime: Approx. 2 hours

〇 Selectable Difficulty (Easy Mode starts with best gear)

〇 Erotic Scenes: 24

〇 Erotic Illustrations: 113 (including variations)

〇 All Erotic Scenes Fully Voiced (CV: Arigatai~Watashi)

〇 Recollection Room (Fully unlocks after clearing)

〇 Engine: RPG Maker MV

Characters:

Mikage

CV: Arigatai~Watashi

Height: 162cm

Personality: Gentle demeanor but strong-willed and resolute

A female swordsman from the Eastern Lands who traveled to the continent on a warrior's journey. She earns her keep taking on guild requests, escort missions, and monster subjugation. Her skills are first-rate, and she shows no mercy to her enemies.

While searching for work in the city of Keter, she encounters Elresia and her entourage.

Due to past trauma, she has a strong aversion to anything associated with drugs...

Elresia

CV: Arigatai~Watashi

Height: 148cm

Personality: Gentle and reserved

Princess of the Malkut Kingdom, which fell due to a coup d'état. Known as the "Nation's Flower" and the "Radiant Gem of Malkut," she is exceptionally beautiful even among her siblings.

While other princes and princesses of royal blood existed, all are now missing and presumed dead. As the only one seen escaping alive, she is pursued by the military of the neighboring enemy nation, Keter...

Accompanied by her few remaining royal guards, she meets Mikage while journeying toward the allied nation of Tipheret.
description_short: Can Mikage protect her new lord from the enemy's grasp? Stake your life to defend the beautiful princess!
